caption: A man with short, dark hair and facial stubble is positioned in front of a professional microphone in a studio setting, with a dark, ribbed acoustic foam wall serving as the background. He is wearing large black headphones and a black zip-up hoodie over a grey shirt. Throughout the sequence, he is speaking into a large silver microphone held by a black boom arm. In the initial moments, he looks slightly to his right with a neutral expression. He then raises his right hand, gesturing with his fingers as he continues to speak. As the sequence progresses, he lowers his arm back down, maintaining his focus toward something or someone off-camera to the right. The camera remains stationary in a medium close-up shot, focusing on his upper body and head as he engages in conversation.
